positive: A retro 8-bit pixel art scene of a cozy cyberpunk noodle shop in a rainy Tokyo alleyway. Focus on neon signs, steam rising from bowls, and detailed rain reflections. Style: Vaporwave aesthetic, pixel art, limited color palette (pinks, blues, cyans), isometric view.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, high resolution, smooth blending
